text:
There once was a little bunny who loved to hop everywhere. One sunny morning, she hopped across meadows picking daisies, until she stumbled upon old Mr. Fiddlehead. Mr. Fiddlehead played haunting tunes on his peculiar fiddle.

That evening, the rabbit invited herself inside. There was a cozy fire crackling, and Mr. Fiddlehead served her carrot cake. As they nibbled on sweet treats, Mr. Fiddlehead sang stories so old they could fill a library.

For days, they'd dance around the kitchen while Mr. Fiddlehead told tales. Then one day he stopped mid-song, looking serious. "I've been playing with magic."

The rabbit was intrigued. "Oh?"

"That fiddle?"

"Yes."

"Well?"

"It has the power to make things disappear."

"You want a vanished gooseberry?"

Mr. Fiddlehead laughed heartily. "It's more than that."

"Oh?"

"Well, once."

"I want to hear."
